sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, date_value Date32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, date_value) VALUES (1, fromDaysSinceYearZero32(737791));
UPDATE test_dates SET date_value = fromDaysSinceYearZero32(10000) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, date_value, toString(date_value) AS date_string FROM test_dates WHERE date_value > fromDaysSinceYearZero32(730000);
